chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Mahbub

text: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن محبوب فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ؛ و سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد ابن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari and Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub.
